name: Buddy Holly
abstract: Charles Hardin Holley (September 7, 1936 – February 3, 1959), known professionally by his stage name Buddy Holly, was an American singer, songwriter, and musician who was a central and pioneering figure of rock and roll. He was born to a musical family in Lubbock, Texas, during the Great Depression, and learned to play guitar and sing al…

about_quotes.speaker: David Albert Francis
about_quotes.evidence: I did "Peggy Sue" with Buddy Holly... I played drums on his first New York recording with Buddy Holly.

about_quotes.speaker: Red Callender
about_quotes.evidence: It was The Buddy Holly Story. But that one was cancelled, because Buddy Holly's widow didn't... They hadn't gotten things straight with her...
